comment: The five highest-hiring PM specializations of 2025-26, per Lenny's job-market reports and prep-platform coverage (see PR notes). Keys must have a rubric tilt in rubric.ARCHETYPE_WEIGHTS. Order = display order.

categories.name: Core Product PM
categories.blurb: The classic loop every PM faces: product sense, execution, strategy. The biggest slice of PM hiring by far.

categories.name: AI PM
categories.blurb: Evals, hallucinations, cost-vs-quality calls. The fastest-growing PM interview — AI fluency is now tested everywhere.

categories.name: Growth PM
categories.blurb: Funnels, loops, experiments, LTV/CAC. Diagnose the drop, design the test, grow the number.

categories.name: Platform / Technical PM
categories.blurb: APIs, system design, migrations, SLOs — where your customer is an engineer and the tradeoffs are technical.

categories.name: Data PM
categories.blurb: Metric trees, ambiguous A/B calls, instrumentation forensics. The loop with a real numbers round.
